title: Machine Learning Engineer Skills Assessment Test | Vervoe

Machine Learning Engineer Skills Assessment Test | Vervoe

Machine Learning Engineer Skills Assessment · Assessment Summary · Skills tested in this assessment · What to test with this assessment · About the Machine Learning Engineer Skills Assessment · It takes a top performer to identify top performers · Pre-employment assessments are more than just a shortlisting tool with Vervoe · Build your ideal assessment · Invite and track candidate progress · Optimize your assessment · Select what really matters · Hire your hidden gem · Machine Learning Engineer Online Test Sample Questions · Traditional job interviews don’t do the job · Transform the way you hire · Hire 90% faster · Predict performance · Reduce bias · Your complete solution for Machine Learning Engineer Skills Assessment · Immersive questions · Content library · BYO branding · Easy invites · Complete skill profile · Candidate report cards · Collaboration tools · Dig deeper and make informed decisions · FAQs about Machine Learning Engineer Skills Assessment · Trusted by forward-thinking companies to hire top performers · Use AI-Powered Machine Learning Engineer Skills Assessments to hire better candidates, faster. · Related assessments · Cyber Security Skills Assessment · Senior DevOps Skills Assessment · Java Developer Skills Assessment · Python Developer Skills Assessment · Test Automation Engineer Skills Assessment · Drupal Developer Skills Assessment

Software DevelopmentMachine Learning Engineer Skills AssessmentAssessment CategoryAllAccounting and FinanceAdmin and OfficeCustomer ServiceGeneral SkillsHuman ResourcesMarketingProductSalesSoftware DevelopmentAssessment SummaryA Machine Learning Engineer devotes their time creating data-driven entities which are able to make informed decisions from being trained against a large set of data. They need to be technically gifted yet also theoretically up to scratch with the latest concepts as they will need to work with large sets of data as well as write code that makes up their machine learning algorithm. This assessment contains 8 questions that are designed to test the varying skills of the candidate’s ability to succeed and thrive in the role from a variety of different skills that are relevant.Skills tested in this assessmentA Machine Learning Engineer must have a wide range of skills in order to succeed, they must marry their deep understanding of computer science concepts like data structures with mathematical concepts like statistics and probability as this facilitates the very way a decision is made when presented with many outcomes. Specifically, in the Vervoe skill assessment, the following skills are looked at it in detail, technical and theatrical knowledge around machine learning and raw statistical analysis of sets of data.What to test with this assessmentFrom a carefully constructed set of questions that test an important subset of the required skills to successfully be a Machine Learning Engineer, you will be able to determine their abilities to solve very tough machine learning theoretical problems like identify the best algorithm for a particular dataset, implementation of TensorFlow code and statistical analysis of classifying data.SKILL TESTAbout the Machine Learning Engineer Skills AssessmentWant to hire the best Machine Learning Engineer to grow your business? Use our expert Machine Learning Engineer skills test to hire the best person and never make another bad hire.Artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning (ML) have become very popular in recent years as the benefits of using these technologies are well documented and these are the technologies that machine learning engineer/specialists utilise to do their job.Candidates who perform well on this Machine Learning Engineer skills assessment will have all the technical skills to use machine learning coding libraries to create algorithms to analyse data sets. They will also have the soft skills to liaise with stakeholders their findings.You can expect to learn whether a candidate is able to classify problems that is given to them, identifying when data needs to be discretised, identifying skewed + imbalanced dataset, classification of problems using logistic regression and their ability to write code in TensorFlow.Candidates need both a theoretical and practical understanding of concepts with Machine Learning. This means they will have the ability to design and implement the required mechanisms which are imperative for the functional operation that facilitates machine learning on an enterprise level.Understanding probability and analyzing statistics, such as the central measures of tendency, distributions, and different analysis methods are necessary for building models from data. Most of the Machine Learning algorithms are formed from statistical modeling.AWARDSIt takes a top performer to identify top performers4.5/5Read G2 Reviews4.5/5Read Capterra Reviews4.5/5Read GetApp Reviews4.5/5Read ReviewsLEADING Machine Learning Engineer SKILLS ASSESSMENTSPre-employment assessments are more than just a shortlisting tool with VervoeVervoe skills assessments test a range of skills in one engaging, user-friendly flow. Unlock the hidden potential of candidates and remove unnecessary offline stages from your hiring process. Increase productivity and make decisions confidently with complete transparency around candidate scoring with data-rich profiles that make it simple to compare top performers.1Build your ideal assessmentAssessments can be created using the builder, write your own questions or choose from our bank of 300,000+, or you can use a template from our assessment library of 300+ verified tests.2Invite and track candidate progressEasily invite candidates via email, or generate a quick link for your job ad, career page or social channel to track candidate source.3Optimize your assessmentTrain our AI to understand what good and bad answers look like for you so we’ll grade your candidates like you would.4Select what really mattersCandidate results come to life with scores, rank, trophies and top performer badges, allowing you to unearth what’s most important to you.5Hire your hidden gemOnce you’ve found the perfect candidate for your role, mark them as “Hired.” Your successful candidate report cards are then easily accessible in your company overview.SELECTING THE IDEAL CANDIDATEMachine Learning Engineer Online Test Sample QuestionsCreate a free account today to access the full machine learning engineer skills assessment test and more from our assessment library.Question 1Machine LearningMultiple ChoiceYou are given a machine learning project where you need to predict the salary of an employee based on features like age, experience, profile, etc. What kind of machine learning problem is this?Question 2Statistical AnalysisTextYou are working on a sentiment analysis project which classifies the text as positive or negative. You were not getting better results and when you checked the skewness of the dataset, you found that the negative class is skewed more than 80% towards the positive class. What is the reason for this skewness?Question 3Machine LearningCodeIn an interview, you are asked to write a Python program using Matplotib for forming a linear plot. What is the correct code to do that?Never make another bad hireTraditional job interviews don’t do the jobTry Vervoe FreeTransform the way you hireHIRE FASTERHire 90% fasterAssessments are automatically graded by our powerful AI to save you time and provide accurate scores for each of your candidates. Top performers are highlighted by score and with trophies and badges.HIRE SMARTERPredict performanceSurface the most qualified person based on how they perform tasks specific to your role. Test technical, non-technical, and soft skills in one assessment. Vervoe learns what is most valuable to you, and identifies people with the skills to match.HIRE FAIRERReduce biasInstead of screening people out, make hiring inclusive by testing everyone that applies for your role. Do away with relying on resumes to find the best candidates and reduce human biases that can be introduced in the hiring process.AI-POWERED MACHINE LEARNING ENGINEER SKILL ASSESSMENTSYour complete solution for Machine Learning Engineer Skills AssessmentImmersive questionsWith 10 unique question types from code challenges to working spreadsheets to engage your candidates and place them inside real world scenarios.Content libraryOver 300 ready to use assessment templates for a variety of different roles plus a verified bank of 300,000+ questions to draw from to create your own.BYO brandingAdd your logo and corporate colours along with personalised intro videos and introduction notes for candidates.Easy invitesInvite candidates to your assessment by email, or get them to apply by taking the assessment directly from your job ad, social post or careers page. Use an ATS? We have a growing suite of ready to use integrations.Complete skill profileResults are displayed with overall scores and rank plus breakdowns of achievements for individual skills. Top performers are easy to spot with badges and trophies.Candidate report cardsIn-depth report cards for each candidate including a breakdown of results and achievements for each skill along with full assessment responses.Collaboration toolsEasily shortlist, compare and share candidate report cards with hiring stakeholders. Leave comments and tag candidates for further stages.“It eliminated bias, and we saw a huge improvement straight away. Candidates were now being assessed purely on their skills”CANDIDATE REPORT CARDSDig deeper and make informed decisionsSee who can actually do the job in real time, create efficiency through automation and quickly surface the most qualified candidates based on how they perform job-related tasks.Track HiresFollow every candidate from invite to hire so you can spot bottlenecks and tighten your funnel over time.Skill BreakdownSee each candidate scored against the exact skills the role demands, with strengths and gaps surfaced at a glance.Team ToolsLoop in hiring managers, share shortlists, and leave comments without leaving the candidate report card.Candidate ResponsesReplay video, audio, and code answers in context, so the team can review the work - not just the score.VERVOE MACHINE LEARNING ENGINEER SKILL ASSESSMENTSFAQs about Machine Learning Engineer Skills AssessmentYes, all assessments are fully customizable meaning you can edit a word or two or delete the question and add your own. You can also customize correct answer samples to your exact business specifications.We offer assessments for any stage of your hiring process. Top of Funnel: Screen candidates with interactive multiple choice questions that include multi-media choices. Assessments are quick to complete (~20 min). Mid Funnel: Combine question types like multiple choice with media, video responses, and a couple of presentation or spreadsheet questions to dig deeper into technical knowledge. Assessments take ~40 min. Bottom Funnel: Focus on a single outcome with a more elaborate question and documentation around the process. Assessments take ~1.5 hrs.You can completely customize an assessment for your brand including logo, colors, and intro videos. You are also able to customize all of the candidate messaging so that it is unique to your brand and business.No, Vervoe assessments test for a range of both job-specific hard skills and soft skills like communication or attention to detail. This means you are testing a complete set of skills so you can be confident the candidate you hire not only has the skills to do the job but that culturally and behaviourally they are the right fit for your business too.We offer a range of interactive question types including code challenges, presentations, spreadsheets, document uploads, video, audio, multiple choice with media options and more. Each question type is a sample version of the real-life tool. For example a code challenge is a snapshot of a live developer environment where a candidate can complete a specific task.We have an extensive online help center with video and written tutorials to help you get up and running. Our friendly customer success team is also only a question away and can be contacted via our help center.Yes, all skills assessments are customizable and can be created to simulate a job or task. This provides the ability to test a candidate on real-life skills and abilities required for the role. A unique combination of different types of questions can simulate how a candidate will perform in different scenarios.Combining a detailed job description with a skills assessment can help to identify the specific skills and knowledge required for a job, and can streamline the candidate selection process. Vervoe provides comprehensive recruitment guides that map out the core job-related skills and soft skills required for success in the role.Vervoe is one of the most sophisticated skill testing recruitment platforms available. It uses advanced machine learning to create tailored skills assessments that are instantly auto-gradable, allowing companies to test candidates for any skill at scale. Vervoe’s automated AI-powered screening leads to up to 90% reduction in time to hire and 67% fewer interviews per hire.Trusted by forward-thinking companies to hire top performersHIRE TOP CANDIDATESUse AI-Powered Machine Learning Engineer Skills Assessments to hire better candidates, faster.See who can actually do the job, create efficiency through automation, and quickly surface the most qualified candidates so you can make data-driven hiring decisions that propel your business forward.Book a DemoRelated assessmentsWe help you confidently identify, test, and evaluate key skills relevant to your role using our clever AI.VervoeinSoftware DevelopmentCyber Security Skills AssessmentThis skill test comprehensively assesses candidates for a Cyber Security role. They spend a lot of time communicating with developers to understand the problems they are facing but also understands problems they could help mitigate through efficient DevOps work.CommunicationDevOpsPlanning and DeliveryUse AssessmentDetailsVervoeinSoftware DevelopmentJava Developer Skills AssessmentA Java Developers’ primary responsibility is to design, implement and test Java-based applications.
